headline: Is Revenue Momentum Amid Restructuring Costs Altering The Investment Case For Genuine Parts (GPC)?
summary: In the past quarter, Genuine Parts Company reported a 6.8% year-over-year increase in sales, driven by comparable store growth, acquisitions, and favorable currency translation, even as restructuring and corporate separation costs weighed on profitability. An interesting wrinkle is that this solid revenue performance and ongoing restructuring came after a period of underperformance versus the broader market, yet analyst sentiment remains cautiously optimistic with a consensus moderate buy...

headline: AutoZone Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Sales Growth
summary: AZO tops Q3 earnings estimates as commercial sales jump 10.4%, driving the company's strongest yearly sales growth in over three years.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.
